routes.name: summarize
routes.description: Condense long text into a concise summary with the main points preserved.
routes.system_prompt: Summarize the user content clearly and avoid adding facts that were not provided.

routes.name: classify
routes.description: Assign a simple label, priority, and confidence to short user text.
routes.system_prompt: Classify the user content using only observable signals from the prompt.

routes.name: extract
routes.description: Extract action items, owners, dates, risks, and decisions from text.
routes.system_prompt: Extract structured facts from the user content without inventing missing fields.

routes.name: rewrite
routes.description: Rewrite text for clarity, tone, or brevity while preserving the meaning.
routes.system_prompt: Rewrite the user content while preserving the original intent and constraints.

routes.name: answer
routes.description: Answer a general question when no specialized task is a better fit.
routes.system_prompt: Answer the user question directly. Call out assumptions and uncertainty.
